title: Officers
doc_html:
§1096.  Officers

There shall be a president, a secretary and such other officers as the shareholders may elect.  If there is only one shareholder, all offices may be combined in his person.  

Added by Acts 1979, No. 225, §1, eff. July 9, 1979.
doc_text:
§1096.  Officers
There shall be a president, a secretary and such other officers as the shareholders may elect.  If there is only one shareholder, all offices may be combined in his person.
Added by Acts 1979, No. 225, §1, eff. July 9, 1979.
